name: Revenue Integrity Assurance
question: Is all billable usage being correctly rated, recorded, and charged — with no leakage between delivery and billing?
ifAbsent: Revenue leakage occurs silently. Unbilled usage accumulates. Roaming, data, and premium service charges are not reconciled against delivered service records.
atL4: Revenue assurance becomes continuous rather than periodic. The autonomous system identifies billing anomalies in near real time, triggers reconciliation, and flags systematic issues for intervention — eliminating the monthly audit cycle.
